RT @mikelund65: With 6,013 career yards of total offense (at halftime) Chachere now ranks eighth all-time in @psuviksFB history. #GoViks
RT @mikelund65: With 41 career passing touchdowns, Dante Chachere has tied June Jones for ninth all-time in @psuviksFB history. #GoViks
RT @mikelund65: For the Vikings, Dante Chachere 12-14 passing, 232 yards, 3 TDs. #GoViks
RT @mikelund65: Chachere with his third TD pass of the game. This one goes five yards to Branden Alvarez - his third score of the season. E…
